message:
test(fj-conformance): add oracle tests for Tan

Adds 18 comprehensive oracle tests covering:
- Special values: 0, π/4, π/6, π/3, π, 2π
- Negative values: -π/4
- Near asymptotes: π/2 - ε, -π/2 + ε
- NaN and infinity propagation
- Odd function property: tan(-x) = -tan(x)
- Period: tan(x + π) = tan(x)
- Sin/Cos relationship: tan(x) = sin(x)/cos(x)
- 1D and 2D tensor shapes
- Small value approximation: tan(x) ≈ x
- Sec^2 identity: 1 + tan^2(x) = sec^2(x)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
